title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Elxsi Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Tata Elxsi Global Group in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
